name: GOLFTEC Eagan
address: 845 Vikings Pkwy Suite C, Eagan, MN 55121
about: GOLFTEC Eagan is a high-tech golf training center focused on data-driven instruction and club fitting. Utilizing advanced technologies such as OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors, the venue provides personalized coaching programs designed to improve swing mechanics and on-course performance. The Eagan location offers private lessons, practice memberships, and custom club fitting services, with a curriculum developed by PGA-certified coaches who focus on measurable results for players of all skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven swing analysis using OPTIMOTION technology for precise feedback
Custom club fitting with launch monitors for optimal equipment performance
Personalized coaching plans with measurable improvement metrics

food_and_drink.notes: No food service available; BYOB not permitted.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides clubs for lessons and fittings, though many students prefer to use their own for consistency. Club rentals are available for practice sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink are not permitted in the training facility. Water bottles are allowed, but no alcohol is permitted on-site.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulation take?
faq.answer: A full 18-hole simulation typically takes 60-90 minutes depending on the simulator software and player pace. Practice sessions without simulation are flexible based on booking length.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and welcomes young golfers with age-appropriate equipment and coaching tailored for youth development.
